arts.ttl: Sunderland ‘another courtier’ for player – January transfer effort underway, very much in the race
arts.sum: Sunderland are making an effort to sign Chuba Akpom from Ajax before the end of the transfer window. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who report that the 29-year-old striker could be set for a return tot eh Championship.
